commands.review_summary:
The PR changes exec background/yield result wording and heartbeat exec-completion prompt selection/tests so retained background exec completions resume task continuation instead of relay/HEARTBEAT_OK handling.

PR surface: Source +49, Tests +96. Total +145 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: a background/yielded command with `notifyOnExit` enabled but successful empty output gets the new “will automatically notify” text, while current runtime suppresses that completion event unless `notifyOnExitEmptySuccess` is true.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for the remaining guidance bug plus real-environment proof; automation should not take over while contributor proof is still missing.
